core.label: Tcl Fundamentals
core.description: Everything is a string — the simplest scripting language.

topics.label: Installation & tclsh
topics.description: Install Tcl and use tclsh. Tcl has 12 rules that define the entire language.

topics.label: Variables & set
topics.description: set varName value. Everything is a string in Tcl — even numbers.

topics.label: Commands & Substitution
topics.description: Commands are words separated by spaces. $var for substitution, [cmd] for nesting.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/elseif/else, switch, while, for, foreach. All are commands, not syntax.

topics.label: Procedures
topics.description: proc name args body. Define reusable commands.

topics.label: Lists
topics.description: list, lappend, lindex, llength, lsort, lsearch. Lists are space-separated strings.

topics.label: Dictionaries
topics.description: dict create, dict set, dict get. Key-value pairs.

topics.label: File I/O
topics.description: open, gets, puts, close. Simple file handling.
